title: Sri Ranga Ranganathanin Song Lyrics Mahanadhi
stanzas: <div>Sri Ranga Ranganathanin Song Lyrics Mahanadhi

Ganga sankaasha kaaveri
sri rangesha manohari
kalyaanakaari kalusaari
namasthetu sudhachari

Sri ranga ranganaathanin
paadham vandhanam seiyyadi
Sridevi ranga naayagi naamam
sangatham solladi

inbam pongum then
gangai neeradi
manjal kungumam
manjal neer soodi

inbam pongum then
gangai neeradi
thendral pola nee adadi

manjal kungumam
manjal neer soodi
dheva paasuram paadadi

Sri ranga ranga naathanin
paadham vandhanam seiyyadi
Sridevi ranga naayagi naamam
sangatham solladi

Kollidam neer meedhu
narthanam aadum
melliya poongaatru
mandhiram paadum

sengani melaadum
maamaram yaavum
ranganin per solli
saamaram veesum

annaalil Chola mannargal
aakki vaithanar aalayam
ammaadi enna solluven
koyil gopuram aayiram

thaenaaga nenjai allume
dheiva poonthamizh paayiram

Sri ranga ranga naathanin
paadham vandhanam seiyyadi
Sridevi ranga naayagi naamam
sangatham solladi
inbam pongum then
gangai neeradi
thendral pola nee adadi

manjal kungumam
manjal neer soodi
dheva paasuram paadadi

Sri ranga ranga naathanin
paadham vandhanam seiyyadi
Sridevi ranga naayagi naamam
sangatham solladi

Kalladam thai veedu
endriundhaalum
kanni un maruveedu
thennagam aagum

gangaiyil melana
kaviri theertham
mangala neeraada
mun vinai theerkkum

neer vannam engume vida
nanjai punjaigal paaradi
oor vannam enna kooruven
dheiva logame thaanadi

verenga sendra podhilum
indha inbangal yedhadi

Sri ranga ranga naathanin
paadham vandhanam seiyyadi
Sridevi ranga naayagi naamam
sangatham solladi

inbam pongum then
gangai neeradi
thendral pola nee adadi

manjal kungumam
manjal neer soodi
dheva paasuram paadadi

Sri ranga ranga naathanin
paadham vandhanam seiyyadi
Sridevi ranga naayagi naamam
sangatham solladi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses devotion and reverence towards Lord Ranganathan, highlighting the beauty of spirituality.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Mahanadhi.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S.P. Balasubramaniam and Uma Ramanan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on February 16, 1994.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sri Ranga Ranganathanin from Mahanadhi encapsulates a deep sense of devotion and reverence. It beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and spiritual connection through its soothing melody. The heartfelt lyrics and the soulful rendition by S.P. Balasubramaniam and Uma Ramanan evoke nostalgia and peace. This timeless classic resonates with listeners, making it a cherished piece in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sri Ranga Ranganathanin from Mahanadhi is a mesmerizing blend of devotion and melody, showcasing the unparalleled vocal prowess of S.P. Balasubramaniam and Uma Ramanan. The enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja elevates the spiritual essence of the song, making it a timeless classic. Dive into this soulful experience that resonates with the heart and soul of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: Ganga, the beautiful river, is like the divine Kaaveri, bringing joy and purity.
We bow to the feet of Sri Ranga Ranganathan. O Sridevi, the beloved of Ranga, please tell us your name.
Joy flows like the sweet river, with turmeric and saffron surrounding the waters.
Joy flows like the sweet river, you are like the gentle breeze.
Turmeric and saffron surround the waters, let the divine song be sung.
We bow to the feet of Sri Ranga Ranganathan. O Sridevi, the beloved of Ranga, please tell us your name.
On the water, the dance happens, with the gentle flowers singing their magic.
The red flower dances on the tree, singing the name of Rangan.
If the Chola kings built a temple, what can I say about the thousand towers of the temple?
Like honey, the heart is filled with divine Tamil poetry.
We bow to the feet of Sri Ranga Ranganathan. O Sridevi, the beloved of Ranga, please tell us your name. Joy flows like the sweet river, you are like the gentle breeze.
Turmeric and saffron surround the waters, let the divine song be sung.
We bow to the feet of Sri Ranga Ranganathan. O Sridevi, the beloved of Ranga, please tell us your name.
Even if the house is made of stones, your beauty will make it sweet.
The sacred waters of the Ganga and Kaveri will wash away past sins.
The waters are everywhere, and I will tell you about the beauty of the land, it is indeed a divine realm.
In the time of separation, what joy is there?
We bow to the feet of Sri Ranga Ranganathan. O Sridevi, the beloved of Ranga, please tell us your name.
Joy flows like the sweet river, you are like the gentle breeze.
Turmeric and saffron surround the waters, let the divine song be sung.
We bow to the feet of Sri Ranga Ranganathan. O Sridevi, the beloved of Ranga, please tell us your name.
